Thus, influences of vegetation on soil erosion and geomorphic evolution can be positive or negative.
How to dynamically display the development is one of the difficulties of the geomorphic model study.
Down the road from UCSD, 30-foot screens at the Scripps Institution of Oceanography project geomorphic data obtained from radar, sonar and satellites, combined into a single 3-D image.
The works look as through they are lifted straight from an underground geomorphic wonderland, but the intense craftsmanship behind these sculptures made of epoxy resin and LED lights is evident.
